item.name: Landing Zones

description.content: Operations for managing AWS Control Tower landing zones

item.name: AWS Control Tower Create Landing Zone

request.name: AWS Control Tower Create Landing Zone

description.content: Creates a new landing zone. This is an asynchronous operation. After you call this operation, you can check the landing zone status by calling GetLandingZone.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Delete Landing Zone

request.name: AWS Control Tower Delete Landing Zone

description.content: Decommissions a landing zone. This is an asynchronous operation. After you call this operation, you can check the landing zone status by calling GetLandingZone.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Landing Zone

request.name: AWS Control Tower Get Landing Zone

description.content: Returns details about a landing zone. Includes status and version.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Landing Zones

request.name: AWS Control Tower List Landing Zones

description.content: Returns a list of landing zones in the caller's AWS account.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Update Landing Zone

request.name: AWS Control Tower Update Landing Zone

description.content: Updates an existing landing zone. This is an asynchronous operation. After you call this operation, you can check the landing zone status by calling GetLandingZone.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Reset Landing Zone

request.name: AWS Control Tower Reset Landing Zone

description.content: Re-enables a landing zone after it has been decommissioned, or extends it to new regions. This is an asynchronous operation.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Landing Zone Operation

request.name: AWS Control Tower Get Landing Zone Operation

description.content: Returns the status of a specified landing zone operation.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Landing Zone Operations

request.name: AWS Control Tower List Landing Zone Operations

description.content: Lists all landing zone operations from the past 90 days.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Controls

description.content: Operations for enabling, disabling, and managing guardrail controls on organizational units

item.name: AWS Control Tower Enable Control

request.name: AWS Control Tower Enable Control

description.content: Activates a control, otherwise known as a guardrail, upon the specified organizational unit (OU). This operation is asynchronous and returns a control operation identifier that can be used to check the status.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Disable Control

request.name: AWS Control Tower Disable Control

description.content: Deactivates a control by removing it from the specified organizational unit (OU). This operation is asynchronous and returns an operation identifier that can be used to check the status.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Enabled Control

request.name: AWS Control Tower Get Enabled Control

description.content: Retrieves details about an enabled control. For usage examples, see the AWS Control Tower controls reference guide.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Enabled Controls

request.name: AWS Control Tower List Enabled Controls

description.content: Lists the controls enabled by AWS Control Tower on the specified organizational unit and the accounts it contains. For usage examples, see the AWS Control Tower controls reference guide.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Update Enabled Control

request.name: AWS Control Tower Update Enabled Control

description.content: Updates the configuration of an already enabled control. If the enabled control shows an EnablementStatus of FAILED, you can re-run this operation.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Reset Enabled Control

request.name: AWS Control Tower Reset Enabled Control

description.content: Resets a control to its default configuration. This operation is asynchronous and returns an operation identifier.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Control Operation

request.name: AWS Control Tower Get Control Operation

description.content: Returns the status of a particular EnableControl or DisableControl operation.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Control Operations

request.name: AWS Control Tower List Control Operations

description.content: Provides a list of operations in progress or complete within the past 90 days. Optionally filter by the status of the operation, the affected target, or the type of operation.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Baselines

description.content: Operations for applying and managing baselines on organizational units

item.name: AWS Control Tower Enable Baseline

request.name: AWS Control Tower Enable Baseline

description.content: Enable (apply) a Baseline to a Target. This API starts an asynchronous operation to deploy resources specified by the Baseline to the specified Target.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Disable Baseline

request.name: AWS Control Tower Disable Baseline

description.content: Disable an EnabledBaseline resource on the specified Target. This API starts an asynchronous operation to remove all resources deployed as part of the baseline enablement.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Baseline

request.name: AWS Control Tower Get Baseline

description.content: Retrieve details about an existing Baseline resource by specifying its identifier.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Baselines

request.name: AWS Control Tower List Baselines

description.content: Returns a summary list of all available baselines.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Enabled Baseline

request.name: AWS Control Tower Get Enabled Baseline

description.content: Retrieve details of an EnabledBaseline resource by specifying its identifier.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Enabled Baselines

request.name: AWS Control Tower List Enabled Baselines

description.content: Returns a list of summaries describing EnabledBaseline resources.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Update Enabled Baseline

request.name: AWS Control Tower Update Enabled Baseline

description.content: Updates an EnabledBaseline resource's applied parameters or version. This operation applies only to the managed account resources enrolled through the baseline.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Reset Enabled Baseline

request.name: AWS Control Tower Reset Enabled Baseline

description.content: Re-enables an EnabledBaseline resource. For example, this API can re-apply the existing Baseline after a new member account is moved to the target OU.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Get Baseline Operation

request.name: AWS Control Tower Get Baseline Operation

description.content: Returns the details of an asynchronous baseline operation, as initiated by any of these APIs.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Tags

description.content: Operations for tagging AWS Control Tower resources

item.name: AWS Control Tower List Tags for Resource

request.name: AWS Control Tower List Tags for Resource

description.content: Returns a list of tags associated with the resource.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Tag Resource

request.name: AWS Control Tower Tag Resource

description.content: Applies tags to the resource identifier you specify.

variable.description: (Required) The ARN of the resource to be tagged.
(Required) The ARN of the resource to be tagged.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

variable.description: (Required) The ARN of the resource to be tagged.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: AWS Control Tower Untag Resource

request.name: AWS Control Tower Untag Resource

description.content: Removes tags from the resource.

query.description: (Required) Tag keys to remove from the resource.
(Required) Tag keys to remove from the resource.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

AWS Control Tower provides the easiest way to set up and govern a secure, multi-account AWS environment. The API enables programmatic management of landing zones, controls (guardrails), baselines, and organizational unit registrations within your AWS Control Tower environment.
